case_title: EVAN BRAND VS. RELATED PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. PARAMOUNT APARTMENTS

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO RELATED PROPERTY MGT. PARAMOUNT APARTMENTS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO DEFT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RELATED PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. PARAMOUNT APARTMENTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRAND, EVAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RELATED PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. PARAMOUNT APARTMENTS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR RETURN OF HIS SECURITY DEPOSIT IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT WITH REGARD TO PLAINTIFF'S FAIR CREDIT REPORTING CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF BRAND, EVAN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY BRAND, EVAN AS TO DEFENDANT RELATED PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. PARAMOUNT APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2008 - JUDGMENT.
